title: Do Certain People Attract UFOs?
summary: This brief interview excerpt discusses the phenomenon of certain individuals having repeated UFO/UAP encounters, comparing it to rare statistical events like being struck by lightning twice. It includes testimony about frequent naval sightings of objects tracked coming out of the sky over a two-week period at sea.

key_claims.claim: Some people see UFOs/UAPs repeatedly, not just once
During a two-week period at sea, up to a dozen objects were tracked coming out of the sky
Objects were observed daily during takeoff and landing operations and would remain in the area
Modern sightings now involve multiple witnesses and multiple detection modes, unlike historical single-witness accounts
